name: property managers handling 10-20 properties/month tool
description: For property managers handling 10-20 properties/month, manual report generation causes late compliance submissions. We automate report generation instead of manual report generation using spreadsheets.
problem_solved: Difficulty in generating timely compliance reports.

locked_fields.primary_problem: Difficulty in generating timely compliance reports.
